TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_qzimux, title = qzimux, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qzimux} }

S.FORM: qzimux ini' kqurum ktan phpah nya' qu qzimux hiya'. ini' khitu' niqun qu qzimux hiya'.
qzimux ini' kqurum ktan phpah nya' qu qzimux hiya'. ini' khitu' niqun qu qzimux hiya'.
S.PHON: qzimux iniʔ kqurum ktan pħpaħ njaʔ qu qzimux ħijaʔ. iniʔ kħituʔ niqun qu qzimux ħijaʔ.
